---
name: Evidence Request
about: Request or track evidence needed for a control review
title: "[Evidence] "
labels: evidence-request
assignees: ''
---

## Control ID
Example: AU-12

## Artifact Needed
Describe the exact artifact or screenshot needed.

## System or Boundary
Identify the system, environment, or application.

## Requested From
List the control owner or team.

## Due Date
Add the requested due date.

## Evidence Location
Add the approved storage location or reference.

## Review Notes
Document completeness, signature status, date currency, and gaps.
